prerequisites: An active Harvest account with access to time and project data you intend to sync.
Your Harvest Account ID, used to populate the required account_id field (it doubles as the Harvest-Account-Id request header).
Authentication credentials: either a Personal Access Token, or an OAuth2 application's client_id, client_secret, and refresh_token.
A replication_start_date (required) in the form the connector expects, marking the earliest data to sync. Optionally a replication_end_date to bound the sync window.

authMethods.name: Personal Access Token (credentials.api_token + account_id)
authMethods.summary: Generate a Personal Access Token from the Developers section of Harvest ID at https://id.getharvest.com/developers. Creating a token returns a random token value plus the list of account IDs it can access. Supply the token as credentials.api_token and the matching account_id. Harvest authenticates requests with an Authorization: Bearer header and a Harvest-Account-Id header set to that account_id.

authMethods.name: OAuth2 (credentials.client_secret + credentials.refresh_token)
authMethods.summary: Register an OAuth2 application in the Developers section of Harvest ID (https://id.getharvest.com/developers) to obtain a client_id and client_secret. Complete the authorization flow at https://id.getharvest.com/oauth2/authorize and exchange the resulting code at https://id.getharvest.com/api/v2/oauth2/token to receive a refresh_token. The connector uses the client_secret and refresh_token (with account_id) to mint and renew access tokens automatically.

setupSteps.title: Locate your Harvest Account ID
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Harvest ID and open the Developers section at https://id.getharvest.com/developers. Your account ID is listed there alongside any tokens or OAuth2 applications. Use this value for the required account_id config field, which Harvest also sends as the Harvest-Account-Id header.

setupSteps.title: Create credentials (Personal Access Token or OAuth2)
setupSteps.body: For the simplest setup, create a Personal Access Token in the Developers section and use it as credentials.api_token. For OAuth2 instead, register an application in the same Developers section to get a client_id and client_secret, complete the authorize flow at https://id.getharvest.com/oauth2/authorize, then exchange the returned code at https://id.getharvest.com/api/v2/oauth2/token for a refresh_token. Provide client_secret and refresh_token under the credentials field.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication window
setupSteps.body: Set replication_start_date (required) to the earliest date the connector should sync from. Optionally set replication_end_date to cap the sync at a later date. Leave replication_end_date unset to sync up to the present.

setupSteps.title: Tune optional settings
setupSteps.body: Optionally set num_workers to control how many records are fetched in parallel. Save the configuration and run a connection test to confirm the credentials and account_id are valid before syncing.

sources.title: Harvest ID - Developers (token and OAuth2 app management)
